name: XMagicTyping
short_description: XMagicTyping is a funny and powerful effect software for typing that displays amazing effects when you typing.
detailed_description:
XDesktopSoft COLLECTION




About the Software

XMagicTyping is a funny and powerful effect software for typing that displays amazing effects when you typing.

Features

  • Workshop supported - one click download or share typing effects.
  • Many editing options - you can change almost every effects.
  • Support Taskbar transparent
  • Game Mode - will pause effects when you need 100% power for your games.
  • Optimization - reduced equipment requirements. Optimized code created for Low-end devices.
  • Multi-Language - includes 4 languages.
  • Compatible with other software etc. Wallpaper Engine,RainWallpaper

Unsupported app list

  • Edge
  • QQ,TIM
  • Modern UI App for Win10
  • Win10 Startup Menu
